options.description: Fails the program when the unit test result is 'Failed'.
Unit test result xml format. Allowed values are: NUnit, XUnit. (Default: NUnit)
Output file to write results. (Default output is Console)
The output template. Allowed values are: Summary, TestResult. (Default: Summary)
